title: Login Page White Screen
description: Users reporting a blank white screen on Safari browser.

title: Failed Login Alert
description: Brute force attack detected from IP 192.168.1.105.

title: Add Dark Mode Toggle
description: Request for a dark/light mode switcher in the dashboard.

title: Home Page Loading Slow
description: LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) is above 4 seconds on mobile.

title: Websocket Connection Drop
description: Live update stops working after 10 minutes of inactivity.

title: Button Color Contrast
description: The primary button color fails accessibility WCAG standards.

title: Double Charge on Checkout
description: Stripe API calling twice for a single transaction.

title: Export Data to Excel
description: Allow admins to download the ticket list in XLSX format.

title: XSS Vulnerability in Search
description: Search input allows script injection in the results page.

title: Auth Token Expiry Issue
description: Refresh token is not generating after 24 hours.

title: Image Upload Failing
description: Profile picture upload returns 413 Payload Too Large.

title: Multilingual Support
description: Request to translate the dashboard into Spanish and Arabic.

title: Footer Missing on Blog
description: The footer component is not rendering on individual blog posts.

title: Email Link Expired
description: Verification emails expire in 1 minute instead of 1 hour.

title: Database Query Optimization
description: Report generation taking 45 seconds to fetch data.

title: Update Node.js Version
description: Current Node version has a known security flaw (CVE-2026).

title: Push Notification Customizer
description: Allow users to choose which events trigger a notification.

title: Incorrect Refund Calculation
description: Partial refunds are not calculating tax deduction correctly.

title: Sticky Header Issue
description: Header disappears when scrolling fast on Chrome.

title: Typo in Terms of Service
description: Clause 4.2 has a spelling mistake: 'Libality' instead of 'Liability'.
